logErrors: As of arcdps 20210923, animated cast events\u0027 durations are broken, as such, any feature having a dependency on it are to be taken with a grain of salt. Impacted features are: \u003cbr\u003e- Rotations \u003cbr\u003e- Time spent in animation statistics \u003cbr\u003e- Mechanics \u003cbr\u003e- Phases \u003cbr\u003e- Combat Replay Decorations
